title: Notification No.61/2016-Cus(NT), dated 4.05.2016
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue Notification No. 61/2016-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 4th May, 2016 S.O. (E).- In supersession of the Orders/Notifications as indicated in Column (6) of the Table below for appointment of Common Adjudicating Authority mentioned in Column (5) of the Table and in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Additional Director General(Adjudication), Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Delhi to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on the officers mentioned in Column (4) of the Table, in respect of the show cause notices mentioned in Column (3) of the Table given below for the purpose of adjudication thereof Table Sl. No. Name of the Noticee and Address Show Cause Notice Number and date Name of the Adjudicating Authorities as per the show cause notice issued Name of the Common Adjudicating Authority already appointed in terms of Order/Notification as indicated in column 6 Order/Notification Number and date (1) (2) (3) (4) (5) (6) 1 M/s Bharat Sanchar Nigam Limited, New Delhi and others DRI/23/08/09- DZU dated 03.04.2013 Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container Depot, Tughlakabad, New Delhi Commissioner of Customs (Import and General), New Custom House, New Delhi Order dated 23.05.2013 (F.
